name: Restaurant Normal
summary: A central Girona destination meal from the Roca team, with a more attainable reservation path than El Celler.
whyItMatters: This is the best-fit 'memorable but not absurd' Girona dinner candidate: rooted Catalan cooking, central old-town location, and an official reservation flow.
pros: Central Placa de l'Oli location is convenient for walking Girona
Roca-family restaurant with a direct, traditional-cooking brief
cons: Official page did not expose current opening hours in browsable text
Likely needs advance booking in summer

logistics.opening_hours: Unknown from official page text; verify on reservation page before committing.
logistics.reservation_needed: Yes, recommended; official site links to restaurant reservations.
logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until lodging is confirmed; central Girona old town.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not a race-day viewing food option.
logistics.transit: Walkable if staying central Girona; otherwise taxi/bike.
logistics.parking: Unknown; old-town access may be constrained.
logistics.road_closure_notes: No race-day closure information found for this specific restaurant.

timing.best_visit_window: Girona dinner on a non-race night.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium if the itinerary depends on returning late from a stage; low otherwise.
